svg.title: Diameter of an N-ary tree
svg.desc: Post-order traversal computing the diameter of a general tree where nodes can have any number of children, tracking each node's height and local diameter contribution, with a running global maximum diameter.
svg.text: n-ary tree — each node can have any number of children
children [B, C, D] → heights [2, 1, 0] → top-2 = 2, 1 → diam = 2+1+2 = 5
